creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
kuriyama    2007-01-19 12:38:38 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc/openjade    Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Added files:
    textproc/openjade/files patch-Makefile.comm.in 
  Log:
  - Installs mapages [1].
  - Patch from hrs [2]:
    o Update to 1.3.3-pre1
    o Install openjade(1) manual page.
    o Fix a possible problem that prevents xmlcatmgr from
      working during pkg_delete.
    o Clean up Makefile to make portlint happy.
    o Improvements since 1.3.2: the following flow objects added:
          page-sequence
          column-set-sequence
          embedded-text
          anchor
          included-container-area
          glyph-annotation
          aligned-column
          multi-line-inline-note
          emphasizing-mark
          side-by-side
          side-by-side-item
  
  PR:             ports/107648 [1]
  Submitted by:   Jason Lenthe<lenthe@comcast.net> [1],
                  hrs [2]
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.47      +19 -9     ports/textproc/openjade/Makefile
  1.15      +3 -3      ports/textproc/openjade/distinfo
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/textproc/openjade/files/patch-Makefile.comm.in (new)
  1.22      +37 -11    ports/textproc/openjade/pkg-plist
